text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's everyone! You all have your things,
right?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. That's what I like to hear. We're good to
go, driver!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. They're so quiet compared to when we first
set out.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I guess it's only natural for them to be tired after
all the fun they've had.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
How are you feeling, Trainer? If you're sleepy,
you can rest too.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Look, my shoulder's nice and available to support
your head!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Come now, don't be shy.

...Anyway, thus ends this year's sweltering summer
camp.
